caption: A man wearing a dark navy blue baseball cap, a dark t-shirt, and large over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain around his neck and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. His t-shirt features the white text "CHECK IT!" on the chest. In the background, a white wall displays the phrase "HUSTLE" repeated vertically, accompanied by small gold stars. To his right, a screen displays the text "ROSS TALK 101". Various overlays are visible on the screen, including a logo that reads "ROSS TALK 101 PODCAST" on the left and "ROSS TALK 101" on the right. The man remains in a static position across the sequence, looking slightly to his left with a neutral expression, while the background and equipment remain unchanged.
